task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the surveyor's memo containing the DMS coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/Hydrography/TSS_Proposal_Memo.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the new scenario file or directory at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or text editor showing a file or folder being created at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/z) Experimental TSS/'.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the scenario for the Solent environment, daytime, clear weather, and sets own ship position.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Scenario configuration text showing the environment set to 'Solent', time/weather set to daytime/clear, and own ship coordinates set to approximately 50.79, -1.29.

task_completion.description: Agent adds exactly 6 static buoy targets with the correctly converted decimal degree coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Scenario configuration text showing exactly 6 static targets (buoys) with decimal coordinates matching the verified list (accurate to at least 4 decimal places, e.g., 50.8041, -1.3083).

task_completion.description: Agent launches the Bridge Command simulator to visualize the proposal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bridge Command simulator window is open and actively running the 'z) Experimental TSS' scenario, showing the 3D environment or radar with the buoys visible.

integrity.description: Verify the scenario is actually created in the correct Bridge Command scenarios directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path visible in the text editor or terminal must explicitly show '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/' rather than a mock or temporary directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually launched the Bridge Command simulator.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Bridge Command application interface is visible, not just a text file or an unrelated image viewer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent performed the DMS to decimal degree conversions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of a script, calculator usage, or reasoning steps in the terminal/scratchpad converting the DMS values to decimal degrees, rather than magically pasting the final answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct converted decimal coordinates for the 6 buoys (accurate to 4+ decimal places) are: Buoy 1 (50.8041, -1.3083), Buoy 2 (50.8041, -1.2833), Buoy 3 (50.7958, -1.3083), Buoy 4 (50.7958, -1.2833), Buoy 5 (50.8000, -1.3083), Buoy 6 (50.8000, -1.2833). The tolerance is 0.0005 degrees. The scenario must have exactly 6 targets. Own ship should be at 50.79, -1.29. Environment must be 'Solent', daytime, clear weather.
